title: Terms of Use | FHA Mortgages Florida
description: Terms governing the use of fhamortgagesflorida.com.
bodyHtml:
Home/Terms of Use
Legal

Terms of Use

Last updated: June 2026 · This is a starting template — have your attorney review before publishing.

By using fhamortgagesflorida.com you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

Not a commitment to lend

Information on this site is for general educational purposes only and is not a commitment to lend, an offer to extend credit, or financial advice. All loans are subject to credit approval, income and asset verification, property appraisal, and FHA program guidelines. Rates, terms, and loan limits can change without notice.

Accuracy of information

We work to keep information current, including FHA loan limits and program details, but figures may change. Always verify FHA loan limits with HUD's official lookup and confirm any rate or program details with a licensed loan officer before relying on them.

Intellectual property

All content, design, and graphics on this site are owned by or licensed to FHA Mortgages Florida and may not be copied without permission.

Limitation of liability

The site is provided “as is.” To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the site or reliance on its content.

Governing law

These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida.

Contact

Questions? Call __PHONE_DISPLAY__ or use our contact form.
